calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FIRST ACCOUNTING OF TRUSTEE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2009 Off Calendar

Reply To Citation And Request For Termination Of Trust; To Be Relieved From Penalties; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Waiver Of Notice Of Time And Place Of Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-16-2009 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FIRST ACCOUNTING OF TRUSTEE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Continued To Nov-16-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Raymond Levy for and with William K. Andrick.

The Court informed Mr. Levy that the stipulation for payout was not the same as a waiver of accounting. The matter was continued to November 16, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The citation will be vacated on that date and Mr. Andrick's appearance will be waived.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Reply To Citation And Request For Termination Of Trust; To Be Relieved From Penalties; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Waiver Of Notice Of Time And Place Of Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Continued To Nov-16-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FIRST ACCOUNTING OF TRUSTEE
Off Calendar Aug-31-2009 Continued To Oct-19-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

A citation will be issued to the Trustee William Andrick in Propria Persona to appear and show cause why his powers should not be suspended for failure to file an amended account. A copy of the citation is to be sent to the Public Administrator and the bonding company to be put on notice of the possible removal of the Trustee. The return date is October 19, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Maria Lertora, CSR#11935. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FIRST ACCOUNTING OF TRUSTEE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2009 Continued To Aug-31-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Victoria Lee specially appearing for Cindy Yau for William Andrick.

The Court stated that the matter was continued for filing of an amended account and that the summary that was filed did not comply with the June 1, 2009 order. In addition, the Court informed Ms. Lee that an amended account needed to be filed and noticed, and stated that a $25.00 per day surcharge would be imposed on the Trustee starting today and for each day until the amended account accompanied by notice is filed. The matter was continued to August 31, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Lee informed the Court of Ms. Yau's intent to substitute out as Counsel stating that Ms. Yau had moved to New York.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Sara Lerschen, CSR#6213. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy S. McDaniels.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FIRST ACCOUNTING OF TRUSTEE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2009 Continued To Aug-03-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Victoria Li (specially appearing for Cindy Yau) counsel for William Andrick.

Ms. Li stated that Ms. Yau did review the Examiner's notes, that the assets had been marshalled, that there was a misunderstanding on Ms. Yau's part, and that Ms. Yau was requesting an additional month to prepare the accounting. The Court stated that William Andrick had failed to file the accounting, that it was giving counsel two months to prepare the accounting, and that if a proper accounting is not filed it would take one of the following actions: it will remove Mr. Andrick as trustee, order a surcharge, or do both. Ms. Li was instructed to notify Ms. Yau of the Court's intentions if a proper account is not filed. The matter was continued to August 3, 2009 for the filing of the first amended account which must comply with Probate Code 1060 et seq., the California Rules of Court, and the San Francisco County Local Rules.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Shannon.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FIRST ACCOUNTING OF TRUSTEE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2009 Continued To Jun-01-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda./R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Aquino.
